---
title: "Project Proposal"
authors: "Elaina Chao, Natalie Murai, Nathan Munoz"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Learning Objectives

1.  Using dplyr verbs for efficient data manipulation
2.  Creating data visualizations with ggplot2
3.  Utilizing functions to organize code
4.  Use stringr to clean dataframe

## Dataset

<https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/andrewsundberg/college-basketball-dataset/data>

This dataset has data from 2013 to 2026 Division I college basketball seasons. This would work well for our lab assignment because we will try to make the lab narrow down to one college based on different metrics.
